text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Looks like you got an email... with
corrupted text.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I dunno how to fix it, though. I wonder
what the message was supposed to say.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, I can read it! Here, gimme a sec...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
〇％×＃、＄＊△＆□ Ψ∂∂Ψ、ΦωΦ――
(Salutations, Earthling. Thank you for the other
day.)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What a marvelous message! ☆ I'll just type
out a quick reply...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
ХХΔ〆♭〇Ψ☆ ￠￡％、Ⅶ◎∵〓§☆★☆
(Thank you too! Come visit Earth again soon!)
...And send!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But it all just looks like random characters!
And who the heck are you talking to, Marvey?!
